# Example 1: Simple Linear Process (VALID)
# Demonstrates: Basic process structure with user and service tasks
# Rules followed: ONE_START_EVENT, AT_LEAST_ONE_END_EVENT, ALL_OBJECTS_CONNECTED
from bpmn_agent.bpmn.bpmn_lang import Process, StartEvent, EndEvent, Task, SequenceFlow

p = Process("Simple Approval Process")
start = StartEvent("start", "Start")
t1 = Task("task1", "Submit Request", "user")
t2 = Task("task2", "Validate Request", "service")
t3 = Task("task3", "Review Application", "user")
end = EndEvent("end", "End")

p.add(start)
p.add(t1)
p.add(t2)
p.add(t3)
p.add(end)

p.add(SequenceFlow(start, t1))
p.add(SequenceFlow(t1, t2))
p.add(SequenceFlow(t2, t3))
p.add(SequenceFlow(t3, end))
', '
# Example 2: Exclusive Gateway (XOR) - Decision Process (VALID)
# Demonstrates: Branching and merging with exclusive gateway
# Rules followed: GATEWAY_BRANCHING_RULE, PATH_SYMMETRY_RULE, EXCLUSIVE_GATEWAY_BEHAVIOR
from bpmn_agent.bpmn.bpmn_lang import Process, StartEvent, EndEvent, Task, Gateway, SequenceFlow

p = Process("Loan Approval Process")
start = StartEvent("start", "Start")
t1 = Task("task1", "Submit Application", "user")
t2 = Task("task2", "Check Credit Score", "service")
gw1 = Gateway("gw1", "Credit Decision", "exclusive")  # Splitting gateway
t3 = Task("task3", "Approve Loan", "user")
t4 = Task("task4", "Reject Application", "user")
gw2 = Gateway("gw2", "Merge", "exclusive")  # Joining gateway
t5 = Task("task5", "Notify Customer", "service")
end = EndEvent("end", "End")

p.add(start)
p.add(t1)
p.add(t2)
p.add(gw1)
p.add(t3)
p.add(t4)
p.add(gw2)
p.add(t5)
p.add(end)

# Main flow
p.add(SequenceFlow(start, t1))
p.add(SequenceFlow(t1, t2))
p.add(SequenceFlow(t2, gw1))
# Branching paths
p.add(SequenceFlow(gw1, t3))  # Good credit path
p.add(SequenceFlow(gw1, t4))  # Bad credit path
# Merging paths
p.add(SequenceFlow(t3, gw2))
p.add(SequenceFlow(t4, gw2))
# Continue after merge
p.add(SequenceFlow(gw2, t5))
p.add(SequenceFlow(t5, end))
', '
# Example 3: Parallel Gateway (AND) - Concurrent Execution (VALID)
# Demonstrates: Parallel execution of tasks that must all complete
# Rules followed: PARALLEL_GATEWAY_BEHAVIOR, PATH_SYMMETRY_RULE
from bpmn_agent.bpmn.bpmn_lang import Process, StartEvent, EndEvent, Task, Gateway, SequenceFlow

p = Process("Order Fulfillment Process")
start = StartEvent("start", "Start")
t1 = Task("task1", "Receive Order", "user")
gw1 = Gateway("gw1", "Parallel Split", "parallel")  # Splitting gateway
t2 = Task("task2", "Prepare Shipment", "service")
t3 = Task("task3", "Generate Invoice", "service")
t4 = Task("task4", "Update Inventory", "service")
gw2 = Gateway("gw2", "Parallel Join", "parallel")  # Joining gateway
t5 = Task("task5", "Send Notification", "user")
end = EndEvent("end", "End")

p.add(start)
p.add(t1)
p.add(gw1)
p.add(t2)
p.add(t3)
p.add(t4)
p.add(gw2)
p.add(t5)
p.add(end)

# Main flow
p.add(SequenceFlow(start, t1))
p.add(SequenceFlow(t1, gw1))
# Three parallel paths
p.add(SequenceFlow(gw1, t2))
p.add(SequenceFlow(gw1, t3))
p.add(SequenceFlow(gw1, t4))
# All paths converge
p.add(SequenceFlow(t2, gw2))
p.add(SequenceFlow(t3, gw2))
p.add(SequenceFlow(t4, gw2))
# Continue after join
p.add(SequenceFlow(gw2, t5))
p.add(SequenceFlow(t5, end))
', '
# Example 4: Script Task with Error Handling (VALID)
# Demonstrates: Mandatory error handling for script tasks
# Rules followed: MANDATORY_ERROR_HANDLING_FOR_SCRIPTS
from bpmn_agent.bpmn.bpmn_lang import Process, StartEvent, EndEvent, Task, Gateway, SequenceFlow

p = Process("Data Processing Workflow")
start = StartEvent("start", "Start")
t1 = Task("task1", "Load Data", "user")
t2 = Task("task2", "Transform Data", "script")  # Script task
gw1 = Gateway("gw1", "Check Result", "exclusive")  # Error handling gateway (required!)
t3 = Task("task3", "Save Results", "service")
t4 = Task("task4", "Log Error", "user")
gw2 = Gateway("gw2", "Merge", "exclusive")
end = EndEvent("end", "End")

p.add(start)
p.add(t1)
p.add(t2)
p.add(gw1)
p.add(t3)
p.add(t4)
p.add(gw2)
p.add(end)

p.add(SequenceFlow(start, t1))
p.add(SequenceFlow(t1, t2))
p.add(SequenceFlow(t2, gw1))  # Script task MUST be followed by gateway
# Error handling paths
p.add(SequenceFlow(gw1, t3))  # Success path
p.add(SequenceFlow(gw1, t4))  # Error path
# Merge and end
p.add(SequenceFlow(t3, gw2))
p.add(SequenceFlow(t4, gw2))
p.add(SequenceFlow(gw2, end))
', '
# Example 5: Complex Multi-Gateway Process (VALID)
# Demonstrates: Multiple decision points with proper path convergence
from bpmn_agent.bpmn.bpmn_lang import Process, StartEvent, EndEvent, Task, Gateway, SequenceFlow

p = Process("Expense Approval Process")
start = StartEvent("start", "Start")
t1 = Task("task1", "Submit Expense", "user")
gw1 = Gateway("gw1", "Amount Check", "exclusive")
t2 = Task("task2", "Auto Approve", "service")
t3 = Task("task3", "Manager Review", "user")
gw2 = Gateway("gw2", "Manager Decision", "exclusive")
t4 = Task("task4", "Approve", "user")
t5 = Task("task5", "Reject", "user")
gw3 = Gateway("gw3", "Merge All", "exclusive")  # Merges all paths
t6 = Task("task6", "Notify Employee", "service")
end = EndEvent("end", "End")

p.add(start)
p.add(t1)
p.add(gw1)
p.add(t2)
p.add(t3)
p.add(gw2)
p.add(t4)
p.add(t5)
p.add(gw3)
p.add(t6)
p.add(end)

p.add(SequenceFlow(start, t1))
p.add(SequenceFlow(t1, gw1))
# First branch: amount-based
p.add(SequenceFlow(gw1, t2))  # < $100
p.add(SequenceFlow(gw1, t3))  # >= $100
# Second branch: manager decision
p.add(SequenceFlow(t3, gw2))
p.add(SequenceFlow(gw2, t4))  # Approved
p.add(SequenceFlow(gw2, t5))  # Rejected
# Merge all paths
p.add(SequenceFlow(t2, gw3))
p.add(SequenceFlow(t4, gw3))
p.add(SequenceFlow(t5, gw3))
# Final notification
p.add(SequenceFlow(gw3, t6))
p.add(SequenceFlow(t6, end))
', '
# Example 6: ANTI-PATTERN - Consecutive Service Tasks (INVALID)
# This violates: NO_CONSECUTIVE_SERVICE_TASKS

# FIX: Insert a user or script task between them, or use a gateway
', '

# Example 8: Inclusive Gateway (OR) - One or More Paths (VALID)
# Demonstrates: Inclusive gateway where one or more paths can be taken
from bpmn_agent.bpmn.bpmn_lang import Process, StartEvent, EndEvent, Task, Gateway, SequenceFlow

p = Process("Multi-Channel Notification Process")
start = StartEvent("start", "Start")
t1 = Task("task1", "Process Event", "service")
gw1 = Gateway("gw1", "Notification Channels", "inclusive")  # Splitting OR gateway
t2 = Task("task2", "Send Email", "send")
t3 = Task("task3", "Send SMS", "send")
t4 = Task("task4", "Send Push Notification", "send")
gw2 = Gateway("gw2", "Wait for All", "inclusive")  # Joining OR gateway
t5 = Task("task5", "Log Notifications", "service")
end = EndEvent("end", "End")

p.add(start)
p.add(t1)
p.add(gw1)
p.add(t2)
p.add(t3)
p.add(t4)
p.add(gw2)
p.add(t5)
p.add(end)

p.add(SequenceFlow(start, t1))
p.add(SequenceFlow(t1, gw1))
# Multiple paths (one or more can be taken)
p.add(SequenceFlow(gw1, t2))
p.add(SequenceFlow(gw1, t3))
p.add(SequenceFlow(gw1, t4))
# Join the active paths

p.add(SequenceFlow(t3, gw2))
p.add(SequenceFlow(t4, gw2))
# Continue
p.add(SequenceFlow(gw2, t5))
p.add(SequenceFlow(t5, end))

from bpmn_lang import Process, StartEvent, EndEvent, Task, Gateway, SequenceFlow

process = Process("Eligibility Check with Two Outcomes (Merged)")
start = StartEvent("start", "Start Event")
check = Task("task_check", "Check Eligibility", "user")

gw_decision = Gateway("gw_decision", "Eligibility Decision", "exclusive")  # split
approve_task = Task("task_approve", "Approve Application", "user")
reject_task = Task("task_reject", "Reject Application", "user")

gw_merge = Gateway("gw_merge", "Merge Decision", "exclusive")  # join
end = EndEvent("end", "Result End Event")

process.add(start)
process.add(check)
process.add(gw_decision)
process.add(approve_task)
process.add(reject_task)
process.add(gw_merge)
process.add(end)

process.add(SequenceFlow(start, check))
process.add(SequenceFlow(check, gw_decision))
# Branches
process.add(SequenceFlow(gw_decision, approve_task))
process.add(SequenceFlow(gw_decision, reject_task))
# Merge
process.add(SequenceFlow(approve_task, gw_merge))
process.add(SequenceFlow(reject_task, gw_merge))
# End
process.add(SequenceFlow(gw_merge, end))

from bpmn_lang import Process, StartEvent, EndEvent, Task, SequenceFlow

process = Process("Order Processing Workflow")
start = StartEvent("start", "Start Event")
receive = Task("task_receive", "Receive Order", "user")
validate = Task("task_validate", "Validate Order", "service")
confirm = Task("task_confirm", "Confirm Payment", "user")
process_payment = Task("task_payment", "Process Payment", "service")
ship = Task("task_ship", "Ship Order", "user")
end = EndEvent("end", "End Event")

process.add(start)
process.add(receive)
process.add(validate)
process.add(confirm)
process.add(process_payment)
process.add(ship)
process.add(end)

process.add(SequenceFlow(start, receive))
process.add(SequenceFlow(receive, validate))
process.add(SequenceFlow(validate, confirm))
process.add(SequenceFlow(confirm, process_payment))
process.add(SequenceFlow(process_payment, ship))
process.add(SequenceFlow(ship, end))

args.code:
from bpmn_lang import Process, StartEvent, EndEvent, Task, Gateway, SequenceFlow

process = Process("Order Processing Workflow - Validated")

start = StartEvent("start", "Start Event")
receive = Task("task_receive", "Receive Order", "user")
validate = Task("task_validate", "Validate Order", "service")

# Insert an exclusive decision after validation to avoid consecutive service tasks
# and keep max sequential tasks per path <= 4
decision = Gateway("gw_decision", "Validation Decision", "exclusive")
process_payment = Task("task_payment", "Process Payment", "service")
request_correction = Task("task_correction", "Request Correction", "user")
merge = Gateway("gw_merge", "Merge Paths", "exclusive")

ship = Task("task_ship", "Ship Order", "user")
end = EndEvent("end", "End Event")

process.add(start)
process.add(receive)
process.add(validate)
process.add(decision)
process.add(process_payment)
process.add(request_correction)
process.add(merge)
process.add(ship)
process.add(end)

process.add(SequenceFlow(start, receive))
process.add(SequenceFlow(receive, validate))
process.add(SequenceFlow(validate, decision))
# Branches
process.add(SequenceFlow(decision, process_payment))
process.add(SequenceFlow(decision, request_correction))
# Merge
process.add(SequenceFlow(process_payment, merge))
process.add(SequenceFlow(request_correction, merge))
# Continue to end
process.add(SequenceFlow(merge, ship))
process.add(SequenceFlow(ship, end))

from bpmn_lang import Process, StartEvent, EndEvent, Task, Gateway, SequenceFlow

process = Process("Order Processing Workflow - Validated")

start = StartEvent("start", "Start Event")
receive = Task("task_receive", "Receive Order", "user")
validate = Task("task_validate", "Validate Order", "service")

# Decision to keep sequential tasks within limits and avoid long linear chains
decision = Gateway("gw_decision", "Validation Decision", "exclusive")
process_payment = Task("task_payment", "Process Payment", "service")
request_correction = Task("task_correction", "Request Correction", "user")
merge = Gateway("gw_merge", "Merge Paths", "exclusive")

ship = Task("task_ship", "Ship Order", "user")
end = EndEvent("end", "End Event")

process.add(start)
process.add(receive)
process.add(validate)
process.add(decision)
process.add(process_payment)
process.add(request_correction)
process.add(merge)
process.add(ship)
process.add(end)

process.add(SequenceFlow(start, receive))
process.add(SequenceFlow(receive, validate))
process.add(SequenceFlow(validate, decision))
process.add(SequenceFlow(decision, process_payment))
process.add(SequenceFlow(decision, request_correction))
process.add(SequenceFlow(process_payment, merge))
process.add(SequenceFlow(request_correction, merge))
process.add(SequenceFlow(merge, ship))
process.add(SequenceFlow(ship, end))

from bpmn_lang import Process, StartEvent, EndEvent, Task, SequenceFlow

process = Process("Document Workflow")
start = StartEvent("start", "Start Event")
scan = Task("task_scan", "Scan Document", "user")
extract = Task("task_extract", "Extract Data", "service")
notify = Task("task_notify", "Send Notification", "send")
file_manual = Task("task_file", "Manual Filing", "manual")
end = EndEvent("end", "End Event")

process.add(start)
process.add(scan)
process.add(extract)
process.add(notify)
process.add(file_manual)
process.add(end)

process.add(SequenceFlow(start, scan))
process.add(SequenceFlow(scan, extract))
process.add(SequenceFlow(extract, notify))
process.add(SequenceFlow(notify, file_manual))
process.add(SequenceFlow(file_manual, end))

from bpmn_lang import Process, StartEvent, EndEvent, Task, Gateway, SequenceFlow

process = Process("Loan Process with Credit Decision and Parallel Checks")

# Events
start = StartEvent("start", "Start Event")
end = EndEvent("end", "End Event")

# Tasks
submit = Task("task_submit", "Submit Application", "user")
process_docs = Task("task_docs", "Process Documents", "service")
verify_income = Task("task_income", "Verify Income", "service")
approve = Task("task_approve", "Approve", "user")
reject = Task("task_reject", "Reject", "user")

# Gateways
gw_credit = Gateway("gw_credit", "Check Credit", "exclusive")      # split
gw_split = Gateway("gw_split", "Parallel Split", "parallel")       # split
gw_join = Gateway("gw_join", "Parallel Join", "parallel")          # join
gw_merge = Gateway("gw_merge", "Merge Decision", "exclusive")      # join

# Add elements
process.add(start)
process.add(submit)
process.add(gw_credit)
process.add(gw_split)
process.add(process_docs)
process.add(verify_income)
process.add(gw_join)
process.add(approve)
process.add(reject)
process.add(gw_merge)
process.add(end)

# Flows
process.add(SequenceFlow(start, submit))
process.add(SequenceFlow(submit, gw_credit))

# Branch: good credit -> parallel work then approve
process.add(SequenceFlow(gw_credit, gw_split))
process.add(SequenceFlow(gw_split, process_docs))
process.add(SequenceFlow(gw_split, verify_income))
process.add(SequenceFlow(process_docs, gw_join))
process.add(SequenceFlow(verify_income, gw_join))
process.add(SequenceFlow(gw_join, approve))
process.add(SequenceFlow(approve, gw_merge))

# Branch: bad credit -> reject
process.add(SequenceFlow(gw_credit, reject))
process.add(SequenceFlow(reject, gw_merge))

# Merge and end
process.add(SequenceFlow(gw_merge, end))

Create a loan process: start → submit application → exclusive gateway checks credit → if good: parallel gateway (process docs AND verify income) → join → approve → end; if bad: reject → end
results.final_response:
Parsing complete. Scenario plan stored as session.state['scenario_plan'] with:
- Tasks: Submit Application (user), Process Documents (service), Verify Income (service), Approve (user), Reject (user)
- Gateways: Exclusive (credit decision and merge), Parallel (split and join)
- Sequence: start → submit → XOR split → [good -> AND split -> (docs, income) -> AND join -> approve] | [bad -> reject] → XOR merge → end

Here is the BPMN code for the loan process:

from bpmn_lang import Process, StartEvent, EndEvent, Task, Gateway, SequenceFlow

process = Process("Loan Process with Credit Decision and Parallel Checks")

# Events
start = StartEvent("start", "Start Event")
end = EndEvent("end", "End Event")

# Tasks
submit = Task("task_submit", "Submit Application", "user")
process_docs = Task("task_docs", "Process Documents", "service")
verify_income = Task("task_income", "Verify Income", "service")
approve = Task("task_approve", "Approve", "user")
reject = Task("task_reject", "Reject", "user")

# Gateways
gw_credit = Gateway("gw_credit", "Check Credit", "exclusive")      # split
gw_split = Gateway("gw_split", "Parallel Split", "parallel")       # split
gw_join = Gateway("gw_join", "Parallel Join", "parallel")          # join
gw_merge = Gateway("gw_merge", "Merge Decision", "exclusive")      # join

# Add elements
process.add(start)
process.add(submit)
process.add(gw_credit)
process.add(gw_split)
process.add(process_docs)
process.add(verify_income)
process.add(gw_join)
process.add(approve)
process.add(reject)
process.add(gw_merge)
process.add(end)

# Flows
process.add(SequenceFlow(start, submit))
process.add(SequenceFlow(submit, gw_credit))

# Branch: good credit -> parallel work then approve
process.add(SequenceFlow(gw_credit, gw_split))
process.add(SequenceFlow(gw_split, process_docs))
process.add(SequenceFlow(gw_split, verify_income))
process.add(SequenceFlow(process_docs, gw_join))
process.add(SequenceFlow(verify_income, gw_join))
process.add(SequenceFlow(gw_join, approve))
process.add(SequenceFlow(approve, gw_merge))

# Branch: bad credit -> reject
process.add(SequenceFlow(gw_credit, reject))
process.add(SequenceFlow(reject, gw_merge))

# Merge and end
process.add(SequenceFlow(gw_merge, end))

end = EndEvent("end", "End Event")

# Tasks
submit = Task("task_submit", "Submit Application", "user")
process_docs = Task("task_docs", "Process Documents", "service")
verify_income = Task("task_income", "Verify Income", "service")
approve = Task("task_approve", "Approve", "user")
reject = Task("task_reject", "Reject", "user")

# Gateways
gw_credit = Gateway("gw_credit", "Check Credit", "exclusive")
gw_split = Gateway("gw_split", "Parallel Split", "parallel")
gw_join = Gateway("gw_join", "Parallel Join", "parallel")
gw_merge = Gateway("gw_merge", "Merge Decision", "exclusive")

# Add elements
process.add(start)
process.add(submit)
process.add(gw_credit)
process.add(gw_split)
process.add(process_docs)
process.add(verify_income)
process.add(gw_join)
process.add(approve)
process.add(reject)
process.add(gw_merge)
process.add(end)

# Flows
process.add(SequenceFlow(start, submit))
process.add(SequenceFlow(submit, gw_credit))

# Branch: good credit -> parallel work then approve
process.add(SequenceFlow(gw_credit, gw_split))
process.add(SequenceFlow(gw_split, process_docs))
process.add(SequenceFlow(gw_split, verify_income))
process.add(SequenceFlow(process_docs, gw_join))
process.add(SequenceFlow(verify_income, gw_join))
process.add(SequenceFlow(gw_join, approve))
process.add(SequenceFlow(approve, gw_merge))

# Branch: bad credit -> reject
process.add(SequenceFlow(gw_credit, reject))
process.add(SequenceFlow(reject, gw_merge))

# Merge and end
process.add(SequenceFlow(gw_merge, end))

- If Bad Credit: Reject (user task) → Exclusive merge → End.

parts.text:
Parsing complete. Scenario plan stored as session.state['scenario_plan'] with:
- Tasks: Submit Application (user), Process Documents (service), Verify Income (service), Approve (user), Reject (user)
- Gateways: Exclusive (credit decision and merge), Parallel (split and join)
- Sequence: start → submit → XOR split → [good -> AND split -> (docs, income) -> AND join -> approve] | [bad -> reject] → XOR merge → end

Here is the BPMN code for the loan process:

from bpmn_lang import Process, StartEvent, EndEvent, Task, Gateway, SequenceFlow

process = Process("Loan Process with Credit Decision and Parallel Checks")

# Events
start = StartEvent("start", "Start Event")
end = EndEvent("end", "End Event")

# Tasks
submit = Task("task_submit", "Submit Application", "user")
process_docs = Task("task_docs", "Process Documents", "service")
verify_income = Task("task_income", "Verify Income", "service")
approve = Task("task_approve", "Approve", "user")
reject = Task("task_reject", "Reject", "user")

# Gateways
gw_credit = Gateway("gw_credit", "Check Credit", "exclusive")      # split
gw_split = Gateway("gw_split", "Parallel Split", "parallel")       # split
gw_join = Gateway("gw_join", "Parallel Join", "parallel")          # join
gw_merge = Gateway("gw_merge", "Merge Decision", "exclusive")      # join

# Add elements
process.add(start)
process.add(submit)
process.add(gw_credit)
process.add(gw_split)
process.add(process_docs)
process.add(verify_income)
process.add(gw_join)
process.add(approve)
process.add(reject)
process.add(gw_merge)
process.add(end)

# Flows
process.add(SequenceFlow(start, submit))
process.add(SequenceFlow(submit, gw_credit))

# Branch: good credit -> parallel work then approve
process.add(SequenceFlow(gw_credit, gw_split))
process.add(SequenceFlow(gw_split, process_docs))
process.add(SequenceFlow(gw_split, verify_income))
process.add(SequenceFlow(process_docs, gw_join))
process.add(SequenceFlow(verify_income, gw_join))
process.add(SequenceFlow(gw_join, approve))
process.add(SequenceFlow(approve, gw_merge))

# Branch: bad credit -> reject
process.add(SequenceFlow(gw_credit, reject))
process.add(SequenceFlow(reject, gw_merge))

# Merge and end
process.add(SequenceFlow(gw_merge, end))

from bpmn_lang import Process, StartEvent, EndEvent, Task, SequenceFlow

process = Process("Invoice Processing Workflow")
start = StartEvent("start_evt", "Start Event")
receive = Task("task_receive_invoice", "Receive Invoice", "user")
validate = Task("task_validate_invoice", "Validate Invoice", "business_rule")
pay = Task("task_process_payment", "Process Payment", "service")
archive = Task("task_archive_invoice", "Archive Invoice", "user")
end = EndEvent("end_evt", "End Event")

process.add(start)
process.add(receive)
process.add(validate)
process.add(pay)
process.add(archive)
process.add(end)

process.add(SequenceFlow(start, receive))
process.add(SequenceFlow(receive, validate))
process.add(SequenceFlow(validate, pay))
process.add(SequenceFlow(pay, archive))
process.add(SequenceFlow(archive, end))

from bpmn_lang import Process, StartEvent, EndEvent, Task, Gateway, SequenceFlow

process = Process("Retry Without Start Incoming - Valid")
start = StartEvent("start", "Start Event")
work = Task("task_work", "Process Task", "user")

# Exclusive decision and corresponding merge
decision = Gateway("gw_decision", "Retry?", "exclusive")  # split
rework = Task("task_rework", "Rework", "user")
merge = Gateway("gw_merge", "Merge Decision", "exclusive")  # join

end = EndEvent("end", "End Event")

process.add(start)
process.add(work)
process.add(decision)
process.add(rework)
process.add(merge)
process.add(end)

process.add(SequenceFlow(start, work))
process.add(SequenceFlow(work, decision))
# Branches
process.add(SequenceFlow(decision, rework))   # retry path
process.add(SequenceFlow(decision, merge))    # done path goes directly to merge
# Converge
process.add(SequenceFlow(rework, merge))
# Finish
process.add(SequenceFlow(merge, end))

process = Process("Document Processing - Validated with Decision Break")
start = StartEvent("start", "Start Event")
scan = Task("task_scan", "Scan", "user")
extract = Task("task_extract", "Extract", "service")
validate = Task("task_validate", "Validate", "user")

# Decision to break long consecutive task chain
need_format = Gateway("gw_need_format", "Formatting Needed?", "exclusive")
format_doc = Task("task_format", "Format", "service")
merge = Gateway("gw_merge", "Merge Paths", "exclusive")

archive = Task("task_archive", "Archive", "user")
end = EndEvent("end", "End Event")

process.add(start)
process.add(scan)
process.add(extract)
process.add(validate)
process.add(need_format)
process.add(format_doc)
process.add(merge)
process.add(archive)
process.add(end)

process.add(SequenceFlow(start, scan))
process.add(SequenceFlow(scan, extract))
process.add(SequenceFlow(extract, validate))
process.add(SequenceFlow(validate, need_format))
# Branches
process.add(SequenceFlow(need_format, format_doc))  # yes path
process.add(SequenceFlow(need_format, merge))       # no path
# Merge
process.add(SequenceFlow(format_doc, merge))
# Continue
process.add(SequenceFlow(merge, archive))
process.add(SequenceFlow(archive, end))

process = Process("Balanced Workflow")
start = StartEvent("start", "Start Event")

process_data = Task("task_process", "Process Data", "service")
review = Task("task_review", "Review Results", "user")

end = EndEvent("end", "End Event")

process.add(start)

process.add(process_data)
process.add(review)
process.add(report)

process = Process("Gateway Split and Join - Fixed")

# First parallel branch for Task1 and Task2
split_parallel = Gateway("gw_split", "Parallel Split", "parallel")
join_parallel = Gateway("gw_join", "Parallel Join", "parallel")

t1 = Task("task1", "Task1", "user")
t2 = Task("task2", "Task2", "user")

# After join, make an exclusive decision to two tasks and merge back
decision = Gateway("gw_decision", "Decision", "exclusive")
merge = Gateway("gw_merge", "Merge", "exclusive")

t3 = Task("task3", "Task3", "user")
t4 = Task("task4", "Task4", "user")
end = EndEvent("end", "End Event")

# Add elements

process.add(split_parallel)
process.add(t1)
process.add(t2)
process.add(join_parallel)
process.add(decision)
process.add(t3)
process.add(t4)
process.add(merge)
process.add(end)

# Flows
process.add(SequenceFlow(start, split_parallel))
process.add(SequenceFlow(split_parallel, t1))
process.add(SequenceFlow(split_parallel, t2))
process.add(SequenceFlow(t1, join_parallel))
process.add(SequenceFlow(t2, join_parallel))

process.add(SequenceFlow(join_parallel, decision))
process.add(SequenceFlow(decision, t3))
process.add(SequenceFlow(decision, t4))
process.add(SequenceFlow(t3, merge))
process.add(SequenceFlow(t4, merge))
process.add(SequenceFlow(merge, end))

from bpmn_lang import Process, StartEvent, EndEvent, Task, Gateway, SequenceFlow

process = Process("Retry Mechanism with Proper Join")

start = StartEvent("start", "Start Event")
attempt = Task("task_attempt", "Attempt Task", "user")

# Exclusive split to evaluate attempt result
gw_check = Gateway("gw_check", "Check Result", "exclusive")  # split

# Failure handling before rejoining
increment_retry = Task("task_inc_retry", "Increment Retry Counter", "user")

# Exclusive join where both success and failure paths reconverge
gw_join = Gateway("gw_join", "Join Paths", "exclusive")        # join

# Decide whether to loop or exit (based on retry count/result)
gw_decide = Gateway("gw_decide", "Loop or Exit?", "exclusive")   # decision after join

end = EndEvent("end", "End Event")

process.add(start)
process.add(attempt)
process.add(gw_check)
process.add(increment_retry)
process.add(gw_join)
process.add(gw_decide)
process.add(end)

# Main flow
process.add(SequenceFlow(start, attempt))
process.add(SequenceFlow(attempt, gw_check))

# Branches from check
process.add(SequenceFlow(gw_check, gw_join))              # success path goes to join
process.add(SequenceFlow(gw_check, increment_retry))      # failure path goes to retry handling
process.add(SequenceFlow(increment_retry, gw_join))       # then join

# After join, decide to loop back or exit
process.add(SequenceFlow(gw_join, gw_decide))
process.add(SequenceFlow(gw_decide, attempt))  # choose to retry (loop back)
process.add(SequenceFlow(gw_decide, end))      # choose to exit

# Join gateway used as loop entry point (corresponding join for later split)
loop_join = Gateway("gw_join", "Loop Entry", "exclusive")

attempt = Task("task_attempt", "Attempt Task", "user")

# Exclusive split to evaluate the result
check = Gateway("gw_check", "Check Result", "exclusive")  # split

process.add(attempt)

process.add(end)

process.add(SequenceFlow(loop_join, attempt))
process.add(SequenceFlow(attempt, check))

# Split outcomes
process.add(SequenceFlow(check, end))             # success → end
process.add(SequenceFlow(check, loop_join))       # failure → back to loop entry (join)

from bpmn_lang import Process, StartEvent, EndEvent, Task, Gateway, SequenceFlow

process = Process("Loop With Work - Fixed")
start = StartEvent("start", "Start Event")
t1 = Task("task1", "Task1", "user")

# Split and join gateways with a task inside the loop
split = Gateway("gw_split", "Split", "exclusive")
work = Task("task_work", "Loop Work", "user")
join = Gateway("gw_join", "Join", "exclusive")

end = EndEvent("end", "End Event")

process.add(start)
process.add(t1)
process.add(split)
process.add(work)
process.add(join)
process.add(end)

process.add(SequenceFlow(start, t1))
process.add(SequenceFlow(t1, split))
# Loop path with a task inside
process.add(SequenceFlow(split, work))
process.add(SequenceFlow(work, join))
# Exit path
process.add(SequenceFlow(split, join))
# Decide to loop again or exit
process.add(SequenceFlow(join, split))  # loop back allowed with tasks in between
# Final exit
process.add(SequenceFlow(join, end))

from bpmn_lang import Process, StartEvent, EndEvent, Task, Gateway, SequenceFlow

process = Process("Symmetric Branching - XOR Split/Join")
start = StartEvent("start", "Start Event")

# Branching structure
split = Gateway("gw_split", "Decision", "exclusive")     # split
approve = Task("task_approve", "Approve Task", "user")
reject = Task("task_reject", "Reject Task", "user")
join = Gateway("gw_join", "Merge Decision", "exclusive") # join

notify = Task("task_notify", "Notify", "service")
end = EndEvent("end", "End Event")

process.add(start)
process.add(split)
process.add(approve)
process.add(reject)
process.add(join)
process.add(notify)
process.add(end)

process.add(SequenceFlow(start, split))
process.add(SequenceFlow(split, approve))
process.add(SequenceFlow(split, reject))
process.add(SequenceFlow(approve, join))
process.add(SequenceFlow(reject, join))
process.add(SequenceFlow(join, notify))
process.add(SequenceFlow(notify, end))

from bpmn_lang import Process, StartEvent, EndEvent, Task, Gateway, SequenceFlow

process = Process("Comprehensive Order Workflow - Valid")

# Events
start = StartEvent("start", "Start Event")
end = EndEvent("end", "End Event")

# Tasks
receive = Task("task_receive", "Receive Order", "user")
process_payment = Task("task_payment", "Process Payment", "service")
prepare_shipment = Task("task_prepare", "Prepare Shipment", "service")
rework_prepare = Task("task_rework_prepare", "Rework Prepare Shipment", "service")
ship = Task("task_ship", "Ship Order", "user")

# Gateways
split_parallel = Gateway("gw_split", "Parallel Split", "parallel")
join_parallel = Gateway("gw_join", "Parallel Join", "parallel")
quality_check = Gateway("gw_quality", "Quality Check", "exclusive")   # split
q_merge = Gateway("gw_qmerge", "Merge Quality", "exclusive")            # join

# Add elements
process.add(start)
process.add(receive)
process.add(split_parallel)
process.add(process_payment)
process.add(prepare_shipment)
process.add(join_parallel)
process.add(quality_check)
process.add(rework_prepare)
process.add(q_merge)
process.add(ship)
process.add(end)

# Main flow
process.add(SequenceFlow(start, receive))
process.add(SequenceFlow(receive, split_parallel))

# Parallel branches
process.add(SequenceFlow(split_parallel, process_payment))
process.add(SequenceFlow(split_parallel, prepare_shipment))

# Rejoin after both complete
process.add(SequenceFlow(process_payment, join_parallel))
process.add(SequenceFlow(prepare_shipment, join_parallel))

# Quality check
process.add(SequenceFlow(join_parallel, quality_check))
# Branches of quality check
process.add(SequenceFlow(quality_check, q_merge))            # pass path goes directly to merge
process.add(SequenceFlow(quality_check, rework_prepare))     # fail path goes to rework then merge
process.add(SequenceFlow(rework_prepare, q_merge))

# After merge, proceed to ship and end
process.add(SequenceFlow(q_merge, ship))
process.add(SequenceFlow(ship, end))

You are a helpful agent who can generate BPMN process code using the bpmn_lang.py language, which implements BPMN 2.0.2 standard elements in Python.
    - You need to always import using `from bpmn_lang import Process, ...`

Create a comprehensive order workflow: start → receive order → parallel split (process payment AND prepare shipment) → join → quality check gateway → if pass: ship → end; if fail: return to prepare shipment
results.final_response:
Parsing complete. Scenario plan stored as session.state['scenario_plan'] with:
- Tasks: Receive Order (user), Process Payment (service), Prepare Shipment (service), Ship Order (user)
- Gateways: Parallel split and join, then exclusive quality check with loop-back on fail
- Sequence flows: start → receive → AND split → [payment || prepare] → AND join → XOR check → pass to ship → end; fail loops back to prepare for rework (then rejoin/check again)

Here is the BPMN code:

from bpmn_lang import Process, StartEvent, EndEvent, Task, Gateway, SequenceFlow

process = Process("Comprehensive Order Workflow")

# Events
start = StartEvent("start", "Start Event")
end = EndEvent("end", "End Event")

# Tasks
receive = Task("task_receive", "Receive Order", "user")
process_payment = Task("task_payment", "Process Payment", "service")
prepare_shipment = Task("task_prepare", "Prepare Shipment", "service")
ship = Task("task_ship", "Ship Order", "user")

# Gateways
split_parallel = Gateway("gw_split", "Parallel Split", "parallel")
join_parallel = Gateway("gw_join", "Parallel Join", "parallel")
quality_check = Gateway("gw_quality", "Quality Check", "exclusive")

# Add elements
process.add(start)
process.add(receive)
process.add(split_parallel)
process.add(process_payment)
process.add(prepare_shipment)
process.add(join_parallel)
process.add(quality_check)
process.add(ship)
process.add(end)

# Main flow
process.add(SequenceFlow(start, receive))
process.add(SequenceFlow(receive, split_parallel))

# Parallel branches
process.add(SequenceFlow(split_parallel, process_payment))
process.add(SequenceFlow(split_parallel, prepare_shipment))

# Rejoin after both complete
process.add(SequenceFlow(process_payment, join_parallel))
process.add(SequenceFlow(prepare_shipment, join_parallel))

# Quality check
process.add(SequenceFlow(join_parallel, quality_check))

# Pass path
process.add(SequenceFlow(quality_check, ship))
process.add(SequenceFlow(ship, end))

# Fail path loops back to rework prepare, then back into join for another check
process.add(SequenceFlow(quality_check, prepare_shipment))

prepare_shipment = Task("task_prepare", "Prepare Shipment", "service")
rework_prepare = Task("task_rework_prepare", "Rework Prepare Shipment", "service")
ship = Task("task_ship", "Ship Order", "user")

# Gateways
split_parallel = Gateway("gw_split", "Parallel Split", "parallel")
join_parallel = Gateway("gw_join", "Parallel Join", "parallel")
quality_check = Gateway("gw_quality", "Quality Check", "exclusive")
q_merge = Gateway("gw_qmerge", "Merge Quality", "exclusive")

process.add(process_payment)
process.add(prepare_shipment)

process.add(q_merge)
process.add(ship)
process.add(end)

# Main flow

process.add(SequenceFlow(receive, split_parallel))

# Parallel branches

process.add(SequenceFlow(split_parallel, prepare_shipment))

process.add(SequenceFlow(prepare_shipment, join_parallel))

# Quality check

process.add(SequenceFlow(quality_check, q_merge))
process.add(SequenceFlow(quality_check, rework_prepare))
process.add(SequenceFlow(rework_prepare, q_merge))

process.add(SequenceFlow(q_merge, ship))
process.add(SequenceFlow(ship, end))

parts.text:
Parsing complete. Scenario plan stored as session.state['scenario_plan'] with:
- Tasks: Receive Order (user), Process Payment (service), Prepare Shipment (service), Ship Order (user)
- Gateways: Parallel split and join, then exclusive quality check with loop-back on fail
- Sequence flows: start → receive → AND split → [payment || prepare] → AND join → XOR check → pass to ship → end; fail loops back to prepare for rework (then rejoin/check again)

Here is the BPMN code:

from bpmn_lang import Process, StartEvent, EndEvent, Task, Gateway, SequenceFlow

process = Process("Comprehensive Order Workflow")

# Events
start = StartEvent("start", "Start Event")
end = EndEvent("end", "End Event")

# Tasks
receive = Task("task_receive", "Receive Order", "user")
process_payment = Task("task_payment", "Process Payment", "service")
prepare_shipment = Task("task_prepare", "Prepare Shipment", "service")
ship = Task("task_ship", "Ship Order", "user")

# Gateways
split_parallel = Gateway("gw_split", "Parallel Split", "parallel")
join_parallel = Gateway("gw_join", "Parallel Join", "parallel")
quality_check = Gateway("gw_quality", "Quality Check", "exclusive")

# Add elements
process.add(start)
process.add(receive)
process.add(split_parallel)
process.add(process_payment)
process.add(prepare_shipment)
process.add(join_parallel)
process.add(quality_check)
process.add(ship)
process.add(end)

# Main flow
process.add(SequenceFlow(start, receive))
process.add(SequenceFlow(receive, split_parallel))

# Parallel branches
process.add(SequenceFlow(split_parallel, process_payment))
process.add(SequenceFlow(split_parallel, prepare_shipment))

# Rejoin after both complete
process.add(SequenceFlow(process_payment, join_parallel))
process.add(SequenceFlow(prepare_shipment, join_parallel))

# Quality check
process.add(SequenceFlow(join_parallel, quality_check))

# Pass path
process.add(SequenceFlow(quality_check, ship))
process.add(SequenceFlow(ship, end))

# Fail path loops back to rework prepare, then back into join for another check
process.add(SequenceFlow(quality_check, prepare_shipment))

from bpmn_lang import Process, StartEvent, EndEvent, Task, Gateway, SequenceFlow

process = Process("Comprehensive Order Workflow - Valid")

# Events
start = StartEvent("start", "Start Event")
end = EndEvent("end", "End Event")

# Tasks
receive = Task("task_receive", "Receive Order", "user")
process_payment = Task("task_payment", "Process Payment", "service")
prepare_shipment = Task("task_prepare", "Prepare Shipment", "service")
rework_prepare = Task("task_rework_prepare", "Rework Prepare Shipment", "service")
ship = Task("task_ship", "Ship Order", "user")

# Gateways
split_parallel = Gateway("gw_split", "Parallel Split", "parallel")
join_parallel = Gateway("gw_join", "Parallel Join", "parallel")
quality_check = Gateway("gw_quality", "Quality Check", "exclusive")   # split
q_merge = Gateway("gw_qmerge", "Merge Quality", "exclusive")            # join

# Add elements
process.add(start)
process.add(receive)
process.add(split_parallel)
process.add(process_payment)
process.add(prepare_shipment)
process.add(join_parallel)
process.add(quality_check)
process.add(rework_prepare)
process.add(q_merge)
process.add(ship)
process.add(end)

# Main flow
process.add(SequenceFlow(start, receive))
process.add(SequenceFlow(receive, split_parallel))

# Parallel branches
process.add(SequenceFlow(split_parallel, process_payment))
process.add(SequenceFlow(split_parallel, prepare_shipment))

# Rejoin after both complete
process.add(SequenceFlow(process_payment, join_parallel))
process.add(SequenceFlow(prepare_shipment, join_parallel))

# Quality check
process.add(SequenceFlow(join_parallel, quality_check))
# Branches of quality check
process.add(SequenceFlow(quality_check, q_merge))            # pass path goes directly to merge
process.add(SequenceFlow(quality_check, rework_prepare))     # fail path goes to rework then merge
process.add(SequenceFlow(rework_prepare, q_merge))

# After merge, proceed to ship and end
process.add(SequenceFlow(q_merge, ship))
process.add(SequenceFlow(ship, end))

process = Process("Comprehensive Order Fulfillment")

# Events
start = StartEvent("start", "Start Event")
end = EndEvent("end", "End Event")

# Tasks
validate = Task("task_validate", "Validate Order", "user")
check_inventory = Task("task_inventory", "Check Inventory", "service")
process_payment = Task("task_payment", "Process Payment", "service")
prepare = Task("task_prepare", "Prepare Shipment", "user")
ship = Task("task_ship", "Ship", "service")
cancel = Task("task_cancel", "Cancel Order", "user")

# Gateways
split_parallel = Gateway("gw_split", "Parallel Split", "parallel")
join_parallel = Gateway("gw_join", "Parallel Join", "parallel")
check_results = Gateway("gw_check", "Check Results", "exclusive")  # split
merge_results = Gateway("gw_merge", "Merge Results", "exclusive")  # join

# Add elements
process.add(start)
process.add(validate)
process.add(split_parallel)
process.add(check_inventory)
process.add(process_payment)
process.add(join_parallel)
process.add(check_results)
process.add(prepare)
process.add(ship)
process.add(cancel)
process.add(merge_results)
process.add(end)

# Main flow
process.add(SequenceFlow(start, validate))
process.add(SequenceFlow(validate, split_parallel))

# Parallel branches
process.add(SequenceFlow(split_parallel, check_inventory))
process.add(SequenceFlow(split_parallel, process_payment))
process.add(SequenceFlow(check_inventory, join_parallel))
process.add(SequenceFlow(process_payment, join_parallel))

# Decision after both complete
process.add(SequenceFlow(join_parallel, check_results))

# Success path
process.add(SequenceFlow(check_results, prepare))
process.add(SequenceFlow(prepare, ship))
process.add(SequenceFlow(ship, merge_results))

# Failure path
process.add(SequenceFlow(check_results, cancel))
process.add(SequenceFlow(cancel, merge_results))

# Merge and end
process.add(SequenceFlow(merge_results, end))

Parsing complete. Scenario plan stored as session.state['scenario_plan'] with:
- Parallel branch: Check Inventory (service) and Process Payment (service), split and join with parallel gateways
- Exclusive results gateway: success vs failure paths converging before end
- Tasks: Validate Order (user), Prepare Shipment (user), Ship (service), Cancel Order (user)

Here is the BPMN code:

from bpmn_lang import Process, StartEvent, EndEvent, Task, Gateway, SequenceFlow

process = Process("Comprehensive Order Fulfillment")

# Events
start = StartEvent("start", "Start Event")
end = EndEvent("end", "End Event")

# Tasks
validate = Task("task_validate", "Validate Order", "user")
check_inventory = Task("task_inventory", "Check Inventory", "service")
process_payment = Task("task_payment", "Process Payment", "service")
prepare = Task("task_prepare", "Prepare Shipment", "user")
ship = Task("task_ship", "Ship", "service")
cancel = Task("task_cancel", "Cancel Order", "user")

# Gateways
split_parallel = Gateway("gw_split", "Parallel Split", "parallel")
join_parallel = Gateway("gw_join", "Parallel Join", "parallel")
check_results = Gateway("gw_check", "Check Results", "exclusive")  # split
merge_results = Gateway("gw_merge", "Merge Results", "exclusive")  # join

# Add elements
process.add(start)
process.add(validate)
process.add(split_parallel)
process.add(check_inventory)
process.add(process_payment)
process.add(join_parallel)
process.add(check_results)
process.add(prepare)
process.add(ship)
process.add(cancel)
process.add(merge_results)
process.add(end)

# Main flow
process.add(SequenceFlow(start, validate))
process.add(SequenceFlow(validate, split_parallel))

# Parallel branches
process.add(SequenceFlow(split_parallel, check_inventory))
process.add(SequenceFlow(split_parallel, process_payment))
process.add(SequenceFlow(check_inventory, join_parallel))
process.add(SequenceFlow(process_payment, join_parallel))

# Decision after both complete
process.add(SequenceFlow(join_parallel, check_results))

# Success path
process.add(SequenceFlow(check_results, prepare))
process.add(SequenceFlow(prepare, ship))
process.add(SequenceFlow(ship, merge_results))

# Failure path
process.add(SequenceFlow(check_results, cancel))
process.add(SequenceFlow(cancel, merge_results))

# Merge and end
process.add(SequenceFlow(merge_results, end))

Parsing complete. Scenario plan stored as session.state['scenario_plan'] with:
- Parallel branch: Check Inventory (service) and Process Payment (service), split and join with parallel gateways

from bpmn_lang import Process, StartEvent, EndEvent, Task, Gateway, SequenceFlow

process = Process("Comprehensive Order Fulfillment")

# Events
start = StartEvent("start", "Start Event")
end = EndEvent("end", "End Event")

# Tasks
validate = Task("task_validate", "Validate Order", "user")
check_inventory = Task("task_inventory", "Check Inventory", "service")
process_payment = Task("task_payment", "Process Payment", "service")
prepare = Task("task_prepare", "Prepare Shipment", "user")
ship = Task("task_ship", "Ship", "service")
cancel = Task("task_cancel", "Cancel Order", "user")

# Gateways
split_parallel = Gateway("gw_split", "Parallel Split", "parallel")
join_parallel = Gateway("gw_join", "Parallel Join", "parallel")
check_results = Gateway("gw_check", "Check Results", "exclusive")  # split
merge_results = Gateway("gw_merge", "Merge Results", "exclusive")  # join

# Add elements
process.add(start)
process.add(validate)
process.add(split_parallel)
process.add(check_inventory)
process.add(process_payment)
process.add(join_parallel)
process.add(check_results)
process.add(prepare)
process.add(ship)
process.add(cancel)
process.add(merge_results)
process.add(end)

# Main flow
process.add(SequenceFlow(start, validate))
process.add(SequenceFlow(validate, split_parallel))

# Parallel branches
process.add(SequenceFlow(split_parallel, check_inventory))
process.add(SequenceFlow(split_parallel, process_payment))
process.add(SequenceFlow(check_inventory, join_parallel))
process.add(SequenceFlow(process_payment, join_parallel))

# Decision after both complete
process.add(SequenceFlow(join_parallel, check_results))

# Success path
process.add(SequenceFlow(check_results, prepare))
process.add(SequenceFlow(prepare, ship))
process.add(SequenceFlow(ship, merge_results))

# Failure path
process.add(SequenceFlow(check_results, cancel))
process.add(SequenceFlow(cancel, merge_results))

# Merge and end
process.add(SequenceFlow(merge_results, end))

from bpmn_lang import Process, StartEvent, EndEvent, Task, Gateway, IntermediateCatchEvent, SequenceFlow

process = Process("Loan Approval with Review Loop")

# Events
start = StartEvent("start", "Start Event")
end = EndEvent("end", "End Event")

# Tasks
submit = Task("task_submit", "Submit Application", "user")
check_credit = Task("task_check_credit", "Check Credit", "service")
generate_offer = Task("task_offer", "Generate Offer", "service")
notify_rejection = Task("task_notify_reject", "Notify Rejection", "service")
re_evaluate = Task("task_reeval", "Re-evaluate", "user")

# Gateway for decision
decision = Gateway("gw_decision", "Decision", "exclusive")

# Intermediate wait for docs
wait_docs = IntermediateCatchEvent("wait_docs", "Wait for Docs", event_type="message")

# Add elements
process.add(start)
process.add(submit)
process.add(check_credit)
process.add(decision)
process.add(generate_offer)
process.add(notify_rejection)
process.add(wait_docs)
process.add(re_evaluate)
process.add(end)

# Main sequence up to decision
process.add(SequenceFlow(start, submit))
process.add(SequenceFlow(submit, check_credit))
process.add(SequenceFlow(check_credit, decision))

# Approved path
process.add(SequenceFlow(decision, generate_offer))
process.add(SequenceFlow(generate_offer, end))

# Review needed path (loop)
process.add(SequenceFlow(decision, wait_docs))
process.add(SequenceFlow(wait_docs, re_evaluate))
process.add(SequenceFlow(re_evaluate, decision))  # loop back to decision

# Rejected path
process.add(SequenceFlow(decision, notify_rejection))
process.add(SequenceFlow(notify_rejection, end))

Here is the BPMN code for the loan approval process with decision, loop for review, and end paths:

from bpmn_lang import Process, StartEvent, EndEvent, Task, Gateway, IntermediateCatchEvent, SequenceFlow

process = Process("Loan Approval with Review Loop")

# Events
start = StartEvent("start", "Start Event")
end = EndEvent("end", "End Event")

# Tasks
submit = Task("task_submit", "Submit Application", "user")
check_credit = Task("task_check_credit", "Check Credit", "service")
generate_offer = Task("task_offer", "Generate Offer", "service")
notify_rejection = Task("task_notify_reject", "Notify Rejection", "service")
re_evaluate = Task("task_reeval", "Re-evaluate", "user")

# Gateway for decision
decision = Gateway("gw_decision", "Decision", "exclusive")

# Intermediate wait for docs
wait_docs = IntermediateCatchEvent("wait_docs", "Wait for Docs", event_type="message")

# Add elements
process.add(start)
process.add(submit)
process.add(check_credit)
process.add(decision)
process.add(generate_offer)
process.add(notify_rejection)
process.add(wait_docs)
process.add(re_evaluate)
process.add(end)

# Main sequence up to decision
process.add(SequenceFlow(start, submit))
process.add(SequenceFlow(submit, check_credit))
process.add(SequenceFlow(check_credit, decision))

# Approved path
process.add(SequenceFlow(decision, generate_offer))
process.add(SequenceFlow(generate_offer, end))

# Review needed path (loop)
process.add(SequenceFlow(decision, wait_docs))
process.add(SequenceFlow(wait_docs, re_evaluate))
process.add(SequenceFlow(re_evaluate, decision))  # loop back to decision

# Rejected path
process.add(SequenceFlow(decision, notify_rejection))
process.add(SequenceFlow(notify_rejection, end))

args.scenario_text:
Loan approval: Start → Submit Application (user task) → Check Credit (service task) → Exclusive Decision Gateway.
- If Approved: Generate Offer (service task) → End.
- If Review Needed: Wait for Docs (Intermediate Message Catch Event) → Re-evaluate (user task) → back to Decision Gateway (loop).
- If Rejected: Notify Rejection (service task) → End.

Here is the BPMN code for the loan approval process with decision, loop for review, and end paths:

from bpmn_lang import Process, StartEvent, EndEvent, Task, Gateway, IntermediateCatchEvent, SequenceFlow

process = Process("Loan Approval with Review Loop")

# Events
start = StartEvent("start", "Start Event")
end = EndEvent("end", "End Event")

# Tasks
submit = Task("task_submit", "Submit Application", "user")
check_credit = Task("task_check_credit", "Check Credit", "service")
generate_offer = Task("task_offer", "Generate Offer", "service")
notify_rejection = Task("task_notify_reject", "Notify Rejection", "service")
re_evaluate = Task("task_reeval", "Re-evaluate", "user")

# Gateway for decision
decision = Gateway("gw_decision", "Decision", "exclusive")

# Intermediate wait for docs
wait_docs = IntermediateCatchEvent("wait_docs", "Wait for Docs", event_type="message")

# Add elements
process.add(start)
process.add(submit)
process.add(check_credit)
process.add(decision)
process.add(generate_offer)
process.add(notify_rejection)
process.add(wait_docs)
process.add(re_evaluate)
process.add(end)

# Main sequence up to decision
process.add(SequenceFlow(start, submit))
process.add(SequenceFlow(submit, check_credit))
process.add(SequenceFlow(check_credit, decision))

# Approved path
process.add(SequenceFlow(decision, generate_offer))
process.add(SequenceFlow(generate_offer, end))

# Review needed path (loop)
process.add(SequenceFlow(decision, wait_docs))
process.add(SequenceFlow(wait_docs, re_evaluate))
process.add(SequenceFlow(re_evaluate, decision))  # loop back to decision

# Rejected path
process.add(SequenceFlow(decision, notify_rejection))
process.add(SequenceFlow(notify_rejection, end))

# Asymmetric split to separate ends (no merging gateway)

from bpmn_lang import Process, StartEvent, EndEvent, Task, Gateway, SequenceFlow

process = Process("Valid Complex Process - Fixed")

start = StartEvent("start", "Start Event")

# Break consecutive services and keep sequential tasks <= 4 before a gateway
t1 = Task("task1", "Task1", "service")
review = Task("task_review", "Review", "user")  # breaks service-service
t2 = Task("task2", "Task2", "service")

# Split early to avoid long linear chain
gw_split = Gateway("gw_split", "Decision", "exclusive")

# Branch tasks
t3 = Task("task3", "Task3", "user")
t4 = Task("task4", "Task4", "service")
# Adjust Task5 to user to avoid service-service anywhere
t5 = Task("task5", "Task5", "user")

gw_join = Gateway("gw_join", "Merge", "exclusive")
end = EndEvent("end", "End Event")

process.add(start)
process.add(t1)
process.add(review)
process.add(t2)
process.add(gw_split)
process.add(t3)
process.add(t4)
process.add(t5)
process.add(gw_join)
process.add(end)

# Main linear part (3 tasks before gateway)
process.add(SequenceFlow(start, t1))
process.add(SequenceFlow(t1, review))
process.add(SequenceFlow(review, t2))
process.add(SequenceFlow(t2, gw_split))

# Branch A
process.add(SequenceFlow(gw_split, t3))
process.add(SequenceFlow(t3, t4))
process.add(SequenceFlow(t4, gw_join))

# Branch B
process.add(SequenceFlow(gw_split, t5))
process.add(SequenceFlow(t5, gw_join))

# Finish
process.add(SequenceFlow(gw_join, end))

Here is the BPMN code for the customer support escalation process:

from bpmn_lang import Process, StartEvent, EndEvent, Task, Gateway, IntermediateCatchEvent, SequenceFlow

process = Process("Customer Support Escalation")

# Events
start = StartEvent("start", "Start Event")
end_high = EndEvent("end_high", "End (High Priority)")
end_satisfied = EndEvent("end_satisfied", "End (Satisfied)")
end_escalated = EndEvent("end_escalated", "End (Escalated)")

# Tasks
receive = Task("task_receive", "Receive Ticket", "user")
immediate_response = Task("task_immediate", "Immediate Response", "user")

assign_agent = Task("task_assign", "Assign Agent", "service")
process_ticket = Task("task_process", "Process Ticket", "user")
close_ticket = Task("task_close", "Close Ticket", "user")
escalate = Task("task_escalate", "Escalate", "user")
manager_review = Task("task_manager_review", "Manager Review", "user")

# Intermediate event (normal-priority path waits)
wait_assignment = IntermediateCatchEvent("evt_wait_assign", "Wait for Assignment", event_type="timer")

# Gateways
gw_priority = Gateway("gw_priority", "Priority?", "exclusive")      # split: High vs Normal
gw_satisfaction = Gateway("gw_satisfaction", "Satisfied?", "exclusive")  # split: Yes vs No

# Add elements
process.add(start)
process.add(receive)
process.add(gw_priority)
process.add(immediate_response)
process.add(end_high)

process.add(wait_assignment)
process.add(assign_agent)
process.add(process_ticket)
process.add(gw_satisfaction)
process.add(close_ticket)
process.add(end_satisfied)

process.add(escalate)
process.add(manager_review)
process.add(end_escalated)

# Main flow
process.add(SequenceFlow(start, receive))
process.add(SequenceFlow(receive, gw_priority))

# High priority branch
process.add(SequenceFlow(gw_priority, immediate_response))
process.add(SequenceFlow(immediate_response, end_high))

# Normal priority branch
process.add(SequenceFlow(gw_priority, wait_assignment))
process.add(SequenceFlow(wait_assignment, assign_agent))
process.add(SequenceFlow(assign_agent, process_ticket))
process.add(SequenceFlow(process_ticket, gw_satisfaction))

# Satisfaction outcomes
# Satisfied -> close -> end
process.add(SequenceFlow(gw_satisfaction, close_ticket))
process.add(SequenceFlow(close_ticket, end_satisfied))

# Not satisfied -> escalate -> manager review -> end
process.add(SequenceFlow(gw_satisfaction, escalate))
process.add(SequenceFlow(escalate, manager_review))
process.add(SequenceFlow(manager_review, end_escalated))

process = Process("Customer Support Escalation - Validated")

# Events
start = StartEvent("start", "Start Event")
end = EndEvent("end", "End Event")

# Gateways (split/join pairs)
gw_priority = Gateway("gw_priority", "Priority?", "exclusive")
gw_priority_join = Gateway("gw_priority_join", "Merge Priority", "exclusive")

gw_satisfaction = Gateway("gw_satisfaction", "Satisfied?", "exclusive")

process.add(end)

# Main flow
process.add(SequenceFlow(start, receive))
process.add(SequenceFlow(receive, gw_priority))

# High priority branch → immediate response → join
process.add(SequenceFlow(gw_priority, immediate_response))
process.add(SequenceFlow(immediate_response, gw_priority_join))

# Normal priority branch → wait → assign → process → satisfaction split → join
process.add(SequenceFlow(gw_priority, wait_assignment))
process.add(SequenceFlow(wait_assignment, assign_agent))
process.add(SequenceFlow(assign_agent, process_ticket))

# After both priority branches converge, continue to end
process.add(SequenceFlow(gw_priority_join, end))
# Normal path also leads to end via satisfaction join
process.add(SequenceFlow(gw_satisfaction_join, end))

args.code:
from bpmn_lang import Process, StartEvent, EndEvent, Task, Gateway, IntermediateCatchEvent, SequenceFlow

process = Process("Mixed Violations - Fixed and Validated")

# Events
start = StartEvent("start", "Start Event")
end = EndEvent("end", "End Event")

# Tasks
prepare = Task("task_prepare", "Prepare", "user")
transform = Task("task_transform", "Transform", "script")
post_step = Task("task_post", "Post-Transform Step", "service")
rework = Task("task_rework", "Rework", "user")

# Proper gateways: split after script for error handling, then merge
check = Gateway("gw_check", "Transform Outcome?", "exclusive")  # split
merge = Gateway("gw_merge", "Merge Paths", "exclusive")         # join

# Add elements
process.add(start)
process.add(prepare)
process.add(transform)
process.add(check)
process.add(post_step)
process.add(rework)
process.add(merge)
process.add(end)

# Main flow with mandatory gateway after script
process.add(SequenceFlow(start, prepare))
process.add(SequenceFlow(prepare, transform))
process.add(SequenceFlow(transform, check))

# Branches: success -> post_step; failure -> rework
process.add(SequenceFlow(check, post_step))
process.add(SequenceFlow(check, rework))

# Merge and finish
process.add(SequenceFlow(post_step, merge))
process.add(SequenceFlow(rework, merge))
process.add(SequenceFlow(merge, end))
